title: Senior Software Engineer - Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates:
Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates!
